title: Sticky, reusable list toolbar: stage pills+counts, search, owner/status/source filters, sort (server-side)
business_reason: CRM navigability: reps need to walk the pipeline (stage funnel with counts), find leads, and focus on their own/active leads. A client-side toolbar on a paginated list would show wrong counts — so filter/search/sort/facet must be SERVER-SIDE and reusable across all list pages.

param_14.question: Sticky top toolbar to navigate/filter the lead pipeline (stage pills+counts, search, owner/status/source filters, sort).
param_14.answer: Reusable config-driven ModuleTable toolbar + server-side filter/search/sort/facet in the shared engine (kernel listModuleRecords) and the CRM leadService. Page supplies config only.
param_14.workflow_entities: school_leads lifecycle — READ-ONLY (filter by stage; no transitions; stage changes remain the existing row action)
param_14.security_implications: filter/search/counts server-side (never client-trust); owner filter + counts respect school/assignment scope; search hits real columns server-side but rows stay MASKED (email/phone); no new PII exposure
param_14.downstream_dependencies: list endpoint gains filter[col]=val, q=, sort=col:dir, facet=stage (counts in same response); ModuleTable sends query params + refetches on change; counts scope-respecting
param_14.assumptions: stage counts = per-stage across full SCOPED set respecting non-stage filters; Mine = lead_owner_id==actor; filters AND-combine; search = OR ilike; results stay paginated
param_14.needs_user_review: resolved: facet counts returned in the same list response (decision 1a); server-side filter/search/sort/facet added to the GENERIC kernel for all pages (decision 2a)

decisions.facet_counts: 1a — returned in the list response (facets block), single round-trip, always in sync
decisions.where: 2a — extend the generic kernel listModuleRecords (+ shared server/lib/listQuery helper); CRM leadService uses the same helper; every ModuleTable page gets it free (P0.6)
